untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) multi-session breakout confirmation with exhaustion/failure assessment, (2) tight consolidation pullback pattern recognition, (3) spring pattern detection for accumulation, (4) strength entry on pullback recovery bar. These pattern-recognition and multi-bar sequence features cannot be expressed with simple threshold operators on single indicators. Specific thresholds for stop_depth, pullback_tightness, and breakout_confirmation_bars are marked [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] in source and require domain expertise or optimization to define.
translation_notes: Pattern-based entry signal requiring visual/structural analysis of price action sequences. Attempted proxy uses price above SMA_20 and ATR confirmation, but does not capture the nuanced breakout confirmation, spring pattern accumulation signals, or tight pullback consolidation logic that defines this strategy. Recommend: (1) Define explicit thresholds for stop_depth relative to pattern range, (2) Quantify 'tight pullback' as percentage of prior range, (3) Specify breakout_confirmation_bars count, (4) Consider adding volume confirmation via vol_ratio_20 for accumulation detection.
